scripts.deploy:sandbox: dotenv -e .env -- cdk deploy --all --app "npx tsx bin/ping.ts && npx tsx bin/provider.ts && npx tsx bin/runner.ts" --context environment=sandbox --profile burner --region us-east-1
scripts.deploy:sandbox:provider: dotenv -e .env -- cdk deploy --app "npx tsx bin/provider.ts" --context environment=sandbox --profile burner --region us-east-1
scripts.deploy:sandbox:ping: dotenv -e .env -- cdk deploy --app "npx tsx bin/ping.ts" --context environment=sandbox --profile burner --region us-east-1
scripts.deploy:sandbox:runner: dotenv -e .env -- cdk deploy --app "npx tsx bin/runner.ts" --context environment=sandbox --profile burner --region us-east-1
scripts.deploy:prod:provider: dotenv -e .env.prod -- cdk deploy --app "npx tsx bin/provider.ts" --context environment=production --profile production
scripts.deploy:prod:ping: dotenv -e .env.prod -- cdk deploy --app "npx tsx bin/ping.ts" --context environment=production --profile production
scripts.deploy:prod:runner: dotenv -e .env.prod -- cdk deploy --app "npx tsx bin/runner.ts" --context environment=production --profile production
